purpose: Close the chained-workflow trigger gap surfaced by LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-AUDIT-V1: GitHub Actions default GITHUB_TOKEN cannot trigger downstream workflows on push. Add workflow_run trigger to sync_runtime_to_public.yml so it auto-fires when auto_project_status or aier_code_heartbeat complete.

phases.name: Inspect current sync workflow
phases.outcome: Read sync_runtime_to_public.yml — found push paths-filter (now expanded to include AIER_CONTEXT_PACKET + ECOSYSTEM_HEALTH_STATE files via Lane_03's parallel SYNC_EXPANSION_V1) + workflow_dispatch. No workflow_run trigger present.

phases.name: Verify exact name fields on upstream auto workflows
phases.outcome: auto_project_status.yml line 1: 'Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate' (NOT 'Auto Project Status' as task spec assumed). aier_code_heartbeat.yml line 1: 'AIER Code Heartbeat'. Used actual names verbatim because workflow_run is case-sensitive name-match (would silently never fire otherwise).

phases.name: Add workflow_run trigger + conditional skip
phases.outcome: Single edit to sync_runtime_to_public.yml: added workflow_run block (workflows array with 2 names, types completed, branches main) + jobs.sync.if conditional that skips runs from failed upstream workflows while keeping push and workflow_dispatch unaffected. 27 lines added, no lines removed.

phases.name: YAML validation
phases.outcome: yaml.safe_load confirms: 3 triggers (push + workflow_dispatch + workflow_run) + workflow_run.workflows = ['Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate', 'AIER Code Heartbeat'] + workflow_run.types = ['completed'] + workflow_run.branches = ['main'] + jobs.sync.if exists + 5 steps preserved

phases.name: Commit + PR + self-merge + E2E test
phases.outcome: Commit da36d94; PR #15; squash-merged at 584bef2 by self per AMD. Test: triggered Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate manually (run 25113517473, completed success); 20s later sync_runtime_to_public auto-fired with event=workflow_run (run 25113539568, completed success); Live mirror caught up to HEAD 86105cb (SYNC_INFO records Triggered by: workflow_run).

trigger_fix_strategy.rejected: PAT (Personal Access Token) — adds secret rotation overhead; max 90-day expiration per GitHub security best practices
repository_dispatch event chain — more invasive (requires upstream workflow modification too)
trigger_fix_strategy.rationale: workflow_run is single-file edit downstream-only. No secret to rotate. Conclusion-aware (success/failure visible). Conditional skip available. Reduces blast radius vs PAT (no token leak risk).

watched_workflows.name: AIER Code Heartbeat
watched_workflows.produces_files_in_sync_whitelist: (none directly — heartbeat ledger lives at network/heartbeat/ which is NOT in whitelist; included in workflow_run watch list anyway because heartbeat workflow-run completes ~every 10 min and serves as a heartbeat for the sync chain itself)

e2e_test_evidence.test_step_1: gh workflow run auto_project_status.yml --ref main → triggered run 25113517473
e2e_test_evidence.test_step_3: Sync workflow auto-fired: run 25113539568, event=workflow_run, status=completed, conclusion=success
e2e_test_evidence.test_step_5: SYNC_INFO.md on Live mirror records 'Triggered by: workflow_run' (was always 'push' before this fix)
e2e_test_evidence.lag_observed_seconds: ~20s from upstream completion to downstream sync run start

acceptance_criteria_status.AC2_workflow_names_match_exactly: PASS (Auto PROJECT_STATUS Regenerate + AIER Code Heartbeat — verbatim from name: fields)
acceptance_criteria_status.AC5_PR_merged_CI_green: PASS (merged 584bef2; sync workflow ran clean post-merge)

next_recommended_tasks: LANE01-LIVE-LEDGER-FOUNDATION (Option B from audit) — now unblocked. Sync chain is self-healing; Foundation can extend whitelist + add new namespaces (tasks/, ledger/, status/, aier-status/) without re-engineering trigger.
Optional follow-up: add unit-test workflow that checks workflow_run target names still match upstream `name:` fields — protects against silent-no-fire if either workflow renames itself.
open_followups_orthogonal: AC5 of LANE01-INH-CODE-02b heartbeat (2 scheduled cron runs verification window) — note that since heartbeat workflow now also triggers sync, the sync chain itself is implicit verification; the heartbeat status will land in SYNC_INFO automatically every 10 min.
